query: motion blur photograph long exposure subject in motion
message: anti-aesthetic / clarity_and_focus / intentional_blur: motion blur, long exposure subject motion - artistic streaks and dynamic blur

response.objective_caption: A close-up view of flowing blue and violet fabric with visible woven texture, showing gentle folds and draping curves where light plays across the soft material surface.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A close-up view of flowing blue and violet fabric rendered with deliberate motion blur that softens the woven texture into streaked, dreamlike streaks, transforming the recognizably textile subject into an abstract composition of color and flowing gesture where the material's physicality dissolves into pure chromatic movement.
